generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor for monitoring incubator thermal stability"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from thermal incubator sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, StateEstimator, FaultDetector, SupervisoryController, Optimizer
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric representation of incubator physical structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equation model for thermal dynamics of incubator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimator, Optimizer, SupervisoryController
]

instance CyberAnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model for cyber aspects of incubator control system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetector, SupervisoryController
]

instance PhysicalAnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model for physical thermal aspects of incubator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimator, Optimizer, CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm for parameter estimation and model updating using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting anomalies in thermal system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for supervising and controlling incubator operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating system states from sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing thermal performance parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance MonitoringSystem : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System for continuous safety and performance monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of safety and operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyStatusInsight, AnomalyDetectedInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for predicting thermal behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for enhancing system efficiency through parameter optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EfficiencyOptimizationInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for triggering corrective actions based on detected violations"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureAdjustmentAction, SafetyInterventionAction
]

instance SafetyStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current safety status of the thermal incubator system"
]

instance AnomalyDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected anomaly in thermal system behavior requiring attention"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature trajectory for the incubator system"
]

instance EfficiencyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized efficiency parameters for thermal regulation"
]

instance TemperatureAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heatbed temperature to maintain setpoint"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SafetyInterventionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human-initiated intervention for safety violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Changes to the Physical Twin are initiated by humans or algorithms upon detecting violations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update CPS and environment models with best parameter estimates; monitors validate system performance against safety and optimization criteria, detecting violations to trigger corrective actions."
]
